title: Araldite | Standard 2-Part Epoxy Resin Glue | Ultra Strong, Multipurpose & Solvent-Free Adhesive Works as Ceramic, Plastic, Metal, Jewellery & Glass Glue | For Durable Bonding & Repairs | 15ml
features: STRONG EPOXY RESIN GLUE; A solvent-free epoxy resin and hardener that acts as a strong adhesive glue, ideal for durable bonding and repairs; Perfect for your ceramic repair kit, craft resin kits, or any complicated jobs which require adjustments

MULTI-SURFACE RESIN EPOXY; Made to create the strongest of bonds, this epoxy glue is suitable for most materials including metal, wood, masonry, ceramics, glass, dry concrete, chipboard, leather, cardboard, fabric, rubber, and most plastics

TOUGH EPOXY ADHESIVE; This 2 part epoxy resin kit will create a tough and durable bond that can withstand high temperatures (-30°C to 65°C), rough handling, and can be sanded and painted after 14 hours; Do not use as a rear view mirror adhesive

EASY TO USE; Clean and dry both surfaces, thoroughly mix equal parts of the 2 part epoxy glue for 30 seconds, apply to both surfaces, and apply light pressure; Remove excess adhesive once partially set; For optimal bonding, slightly roughen surface

NATURE-FRIENDLY SUPER GLUE - Environmentally friendly formulated strong glue for everything with easily recyclable packaging; Store the superglue resin set of 2 tubes in a dry place at room temperature
